questionEN: A developer needs to see changed files. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да види променени файлове. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git status показва working tree и staged changes.
explanationEN: git status is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to stage a file for commit. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да stage-не файл за commit. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git add премества промени в staging area.
explanationEN: git add is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to save staged changes locally. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да запази staged changes локално. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git commit записва snapshot в локалната история.
explanationEN: git commit is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to create a separate line of work. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да създаде отделна линия на работа. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Branch позволява работа без директна промяна на main.
explanationEN: git branch is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to move to another branch. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да премине към друг branch. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git switch сменя текущия branch.
explanationEN: git switch is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to download a repository copy. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да изтегли copy на repository. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git clone създава локално копие на remote repository.
explanationEN: git clone is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to send commits to GitHub. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да изпрати commits към GitHub. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git push качва локални commits към remote.
explanationEN: git push is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to bring remote changes locally. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да вземе remote промени локално. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git pull fetch-ва и интегрира remote changes.
explanationEN: git pull is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to download remote refs without merging. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да изтегли remote refs без merge. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git fetch обновява remote tracking refs без да променя branch-а.
explanationEN: git fetch is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to combine one branch into another. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да комбинира един branch в друг. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git merge интегрира histories и може да създаде merge commit.
explanationEN: git merge is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to request review before merging. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да поиска review преди merge. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Pull request събира diff, discussion и checks преди merge.
explanationEN: pull request is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to inspect proposed changes. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да прегледа предложени промени. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Code review намира bugs, risks и design проблеми преди merge.
explanationEN: code review is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to resolve incompatible edits. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да разреши несъвместими edits. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Merge conflict се появява, когато Git не може сам да комбинира промени.
explanationEN: merge conflict is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to run CI on pushes and PRs. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да стартира CI при pushes и PRs. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: GitHub Actions автоматизира tests, builds и workflows.
explanationEN: GitHub Actions is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to mark a version in history. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да маркира версия в history. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Tag сочи към конкретен commit, често за release.
explanationEN: tag is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to publish packaged version notes. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да публикува packaged version notes. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: GitHub Release комбинира tag, notes и artifacts.
explanationEN: release is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to copy a repo under your account. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да копира repo под твоя account. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Fork създава GitHub copy за independent changes.
explanationEN: fork is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to refer to the GitHub destination. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да посочи GitHub destination. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Remote е named URL към repository извън локалната машина.
explanationEN: remote is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to prepare only selected changes. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да подготви само избрани промени. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Staging area позволява commit само на избрани промени.
explanationEN: staging area is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to undo a local unstaged edit carefully. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да отмени local unstaged edit внимателно. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git restore може да върне working tree files към последния commit.
explanationEN: git restore is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to see commit history. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да види commit history. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: git log показва commit history и metadata.
explanationEN: git log is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Git & GitHub workflow.
